agents.name: ProjectManager
agents.role: Decomposes project requirements into tasks using LLM reasoning, distributes work to specialist agents, replans when risk or stakeholder escalations occur

agents.name: Engineer
agents.role: Implements assigned tasks using LLM-driven technical reasoning; revises implementations based on QA critique in a retry loop (up to 2 revisions per task)

agents.name: QAAgent
agents.role: Critiques Engineer output with LLM-powered review; returns structured issues with severity; drives the Engineer revision loop by flagging needs_revision

agents.name: RiskAnalyst
agents.role: Identifies and classifies project risks via LLM assessment using gpt-5.1 reasoning model; escalates high-severity risks to ProjectManager, triggering workflow replanning

agents.name: Stakeholder
agents.role: Provides business perspective; approves the project plan, monitors progress, and escalates concerns to ProjectManager when satisfaction drops below threshold

real_public_data.onet: O*NET 28.3 Database, U.S. Dept of Labor (CC BY 4.0) — technology demand, talent pool, availability risk
real_public_data.bls: BLS OES May 2023 (Public Domain) — occupation wages for project cost estimation
real_public_data.nist_nvd: NIST National Vulnerability Database REST API 2.0 (Public Domain) — CVEs for stack technologies
real_public_data.npm: npm Registry API (public, no auth) — package maintenance health
real_public_data.pypi: PyPI JSON API (public, no auth) — Python library maintenance health
